mapper.insert: INSERT INTO zombie_vehicle (community_id, house_no, car_number, entry_record_id, enter_time, continuous_days, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{zombie.communityId}, #{zombie.houseNo}, #{zombie.carNumber}, #{zombie.entryRecordId}, #{zombie.enterTime}, #{zombie.continuousDays}, #{zombie.status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, community_id, house_no, car_number, entry_record_id, enter_time, continuous_days, status, contact_record, solution, ignore_reason, handler_admin_id, handle_time, create_time, update_time FROM zombie_vehicle WHERE entry_record_id = #{entryRecordId}

SELECT id, community_id, house_no, car_number, entry_record_id, enter_time, continuous_days, status, contact_record, solution, ignore_reason, handler_admin_id, handle_time, create_time, update_time FROM zombie_vehicle WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE zombie_vehicle SET status = #{zombie.status}, contact_record = #{zombie.contactRecord}, solution = #{zombie.solution}, ignore_reason = #{zombie.ignoreReason}, handler_admin_id = #{zombie.handlerAdminId}, handle_time = #{zombie.handleTime}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{zombie.id}
